Privacy

Browser Lock Chrome Extension — Password Protect Your Browser

Add to Chrome — FreeAll Features

What It Does

OneBuddy's Browser Lock lets you password-protect all open Chrome tabs with a single click. Your password is hashed using SHA-256 encryption and stored securely. Set auto-lock to trigger after a period of inactivity, and customize the lock screen appearance. When locked, all tab content is hidden until the correct password is entered.

Why It's Better Than Standalone Extensions

Standalone browser lock extensions do one thing and add to your extension count. OneBuddy includes browser lock as part of a complete privacy suite with ad blocking, tracker blocking, privacy blur, and encrypted messaging — plus productivity and wellness tools.

Feature Breakdown

One-Click Lock

Lock all tabs instantly with a single click from the side panel.

SHA-256 Password Hashing

Your password is hashed with SHA-256 — never stored in plain text.

Auto-Lock

Automatically lock tabs after a configurable period of inactivity.

Custom Lock Screen

Personalize the lock screen appearance while maintaining security.

Tab Content Hidden

All tab content is completely hidden while locked — not just minimized.

Quick Unlock

Enter your password to instantly restore access to all tabs.

Key Benefits

Protect your browser when stepping away from your desk
SHA-256 encryption keeps your password secure
Auto-lock prevents accidental exposure
Custom lock screen adds personalization
Part of a complete privacy suite — not a standalone tool

Who Uses This

Office workers protecting tabs during lunch breaks
Remote workers sharing home office space with family
Students locking their laptop browser in libraries or cafes
Professionals with sensitive client data on screen
Shared computer environments requiring tab privacy

Frequently Asked Questions

Is the password stored securely?
Yes. Your password is hashed using SHA-256 encryption and never stored in plain text.
Can I set it to auto-lock?
Yes. Configure auto-lock to trigger after your chosen inactivity period.
What happens when the browser is locked?
All tab content is completely hidden and replaced with the lock screen. Content is restored only after entering the correct password.
Can I customize the lock screen?
Yes. The lock screen appearance is customizable while maintaining full security.

Try It Free — No Account Needed

Add OneBuddy to Chrome and access this feature plus 14 more tools — completely free.
